meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery
meta.description: A surgeon known for the cases others step away from. Dental implants, reconstruction and complex cases in South Bay, California.

sections.statement: A surgeon known for the cases others step away from — and the quiet precision it takes.

photo.alt: Dr. Jorge Arce in his clinic
photo.label: retrato clínico 4:5, luz natural

stats.text: Years devoted to oral & maxillofacial surgery.
Founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay.
Medical systems — trained in Colombia, built in California.

bio: Jorge grew up in Colombia, the son of a family that valued precision and patience long before he ever held a scalpel. Medicine was not a career choice so much as a calling — a way to use his hands to give something back.
He moved to California to specialize, and never left. Over twenty-seven years he built a practice on a single, unglamorous principle: take the time the case actually needs.
Outside the operating room he is a father, a mentor to younger surgeons, and a quiet student of his craft — still treating every patient as the person they are before the procedure they need.

sections.title:
Twenty-seven years
of steady hands
sections.text: Complex extractions, reconstruction and full-arch cases — the procedures most practices refer out, done unhurried and done with care.

rows.d: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction, planned and placed with precision.
Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.
The difficult extractions and surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Long-term care that protects the work of a restored smile.
Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, and bone.
Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions.

sections.title:
FIVE STEPS,
ONE STEADY HAND
sections.side: <o>FROM THE FIRST CONSULTATION TO LONG-TERM CARE,</o> THE PROCESS STAYS SIMPLE AND CLEAR.

steps.text: Your history, your concerns, your goals — heard before anything is proposed.
Imaging and evaluation, then a treatment pathway explained in plain language.
Unhurried, precise work — with the time the case actually needs.
Clear guidance and close follow-up while function and comfort return.
Long-term care that protects the work — for years, not months.

lead.big: Referred by the surgeons other surgeons trust
lead.text: Complex cases arrive here by referral from general dentists, periodontists and colleagues across the South Bay.

items.q: When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.
I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.
Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. He sends my patients back with a full report every time.
